creator: gdinolt@pacbell.net
text:
Tried to build GIMP port on 4.0-current as of March 12, 2000. I get the
folllowing error when building:

...
gmake[4]: Entering directory
`/tmp/d/ports/graphics/gimp1/work/gimp-1.1.17/plug-ins/perl/Net'
mkdir ../blib/arch/auto/Gimp/Net
mkdir ../blib/lib/auto/Gimp/Net
Skip ../blib/lib/Gimp/Net.pm (unchanged)
/usr/bin/perl5 -I/usr/libdata/perl/5.00503/mach
-I/usr/libdata/perl/5.00503 /usr/libdata/perl/5.00503/ExtUtils/xsubpp
-typemap /usr/libdata/perl/5.00503/ExtUtils/typemap -typemap
./../typemap -typemap
/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.005/i386-freebsd/PDL/Core/typemap.pdl
Net.xs >xstmp.c && mv xstmp.c Net.c
cc -c -I./.. -I/usr/local/include
-I/usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.005/i386-freebsd/PDL/Core -O
-pipe       -DVERSION=\"1.19\" -DXS_VERSION=\"1.19\" -DPIC -fpic
-I/usr/libdata/perl/5.00503/mach/CORE -Ddatadir="\"/usr/X11R6/share\""
-DHAVE_PDL=1  Net.c
In file included from Net.xs:10:
../gppport.h:246: warning: static declaration for `Perl_newCONSTSUB'
follows non-static
../gppport.h: In function `Perl_newCONSTSUB':
../gppport.h:250: `hints' undeclared (first use in this function)
../gppport.h:250: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only once
../gppport.h:250: for each function it appears in.)
../gppport.h:254: `copline' undeclared (first use in this function)
../gppport.h:264: too few arguments to function `Perl_start_subparse'
gmake[4]: *** [Net.o] Error 1

I am not sure if this helps, but I thought it would be one more
datapoint.

Regard,
George Dinolt
